title: A short headline that explains the kind of work you do and the value you bring.
intro: Add a concise introduction about your background, current focus, and what kinds of opportunities you are looking for.
summary: Use this summary to describe your professional direction in plain language. Keep it specific enough for a hiring manager to understand what you can do next.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Write a short overview of your professional background. Explain the environments you have worked in, the kinds of problems you enjoy solving, and the strengths you want visitors to remember.
Use the second paragraph to connect your experience, projects, and career goals. Keep the tone practical and concrete rather than promotional.
